subtasks.description: Engineer 'u_7732' attempts to deploy a hotfix to production environment 'prod-us-east-1' outside of the approved maintenance window (current time: 2:15 AM UTC Tuesday).

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Deployment attempted at Tuesday 02:15 UTC is outside the approved Saturday 22:00 – Sunday 06:00 UTC maintenance window and lacks CAB approval. Engineer seniority level also cannot be confirmed as >= senior-engineer.
applied_constraints: Obtain CAB approval for out-of-window production deployment
Verify user u_7732 holds senior-engineer or higher role
Reschedule to approved maintenance window if no emergency justification
